name: Chunky Caramel Chocolate Banana Split
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the caramel nut ice cream: Whisk egg yolks, 1 tablespoon sugar, and salt in a medium bowl. In a saucepan, heat half-and-half and cream to gentle boil. Stir remaining sugar and lemon juice into another saucepan over medium heat until it liquefies and turns amber-colored. Remove from heat and stir in the half-and-half mixture. Return pan to heat and cook, stirring constantly, until thickened slightly. Cool custard and stir vanilla in. Strain through a sieve into an ice cream maker bowl and freeze according to instructions. Add almonds for last 2 minutes of freezing.
2. Make the vanilla white chocolate chunk ice cream: Soften vanilla ice cream at room temperature. Beat with mixer. Mix kirsch and white chocolate pieces. Freeze small bowl for 6 hours or overnight.
3. Repeat process with chocolate ice cream and cookie pieces.
4. Make caramel-rum sauce: Combine sugar, water, corn syrup, and lemon juice in a saucepan over medium-low heat. Bring to boil without stirring. Add cream when bubbles stop. Stir in butter until melted. Stir in rum and vanilla. Refrigerate or reheat before serving.
5. Make chocolate sauce: Melt chocolate in bowl. Heat cream with salt and corn syrup until gentle boil. Pour hot mixture over chocolate, let stand 30 seconds, whisk until smooth, then add vanilla and coffee liqueur. Chill and reheat before serving.
6. Make strawberry sauce: Cook frozen strawberries and sugar in a non-corrosive saucepan until dissolved. Continue cooking until berries are soft. Press through sieve into bowl. Return strained sauce to saucepan, stir in arrowroot with 2 tablespoons puree, pour back in saucepan, cook until thickens, cool, add kirsch, chill.
7. Assemble: Whip cream, sugar, and vanilla at medium-high speed until soft peaks form. Fill pastry bag with whipped cream. Heat oil to 375 degrees F. Coat bananas in egg mixture, bread crumb-almond mixture, fry until golden brown. Arrange scoops of each ice cream side by side, place fried banana halves on each, spoon sauces over ice cream, pipe rosettes of whipped cream between scoops, garnish with strawberries and almond bricks. Serve immediately.
6 servings.
